operating_state: No specific revenue or operational performance data disclosed in the provided 8-K filings for Q3 2024.
cost_structure: No cost structure or margin information disclosed in the provided 8-K filings for Q3 2024.
material_events: Anat Ashkenazi resigned as CFO in June 2024, with Gordon Brooks serving as interim CFO from July 15. Lucas Montarce was elected as permanent CFO effective September 9, 2024, receiving $1 million base salary and $1 million target bonus. The company completed a $4.96 billion debt offering in August across five note series with maturities from 2027 to 2064. Dr. Marschall Runge retired from the Board of Directors effective August 31, 2024.
